recommendations.title: Future World
recommendations.overview: A young boy searches a future world wasteland for a rumored cure for his dying mother.

recommendations.title: The Disaster Artist
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actor in Hollywood meets an enigmatic stranger by the name of Tommy Wiseau, the meeting leads the actor down a path nobody could have predicted; creating the worst movie ever made.

recommendations.overview: A documentary examining possible historical and modern conspiracies surrounding Christianity, the 9/11 terrorist attacks, and the Federal Reserve bank.

recommendations.overview: Twenty years after the modern world's most notorious child murder, the legacy of the crime and its impact are explored.

recommendations.overview: The life and career of an actor, artist, and icon. His own journey through his own camera.

recommendations.title: The Cutting Edge: The Magic of Movie Editing
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the art of film editing. Clips are shown from many groundbreaking films with innovative editing styles.

recommendations.title: American Animals
recommendations.overview: Lexington, Kentucky, 2004. Four young men attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in the history of the United States.
